_about: Gold-standard retrieval queries for WS2 (Simple English Wikipedia, Kiwix-extracted). Paths are workspace-relative; the build_ws2.ps1 script places articles under A/ with .html suffix. The DEFAULT corpus is the first 5000 articles alphabetical of the Simple English nopic ZIM -- if you raise -MaxArticles you may want to broaden expected_files. Queries that depend on later-alphabet articles (M-Z) are noted in the _coverage_note field where applicable; they'll only score against a full or larger subset. Run: locus_retrieval_eval --workspace D:/Projects/LocusTestWorkspaces/WS2_Wikipedia --queries tests/retrieval_eval/queries_ws2.json --out tests/retrieval_eval/results_ws2.md --baseline tests/retrieval_eval/baseline_ws2_none.json  (the --baseline path is intentionally nonexistent so the harness skips the WS1-baseline comparison)

queries.query: what is the capital of Australia

queries._coverage_note: Article is in L-range; expand -MaxArticles or test on full corpus.
